category: 商业生产级信息图-行业垂直-法律
source: G7 Track G 演化结晶 - 法律合规行业垂直融合

color_palette.description: 法律庄重深蓝金体系: 主深蓝#1B2838(权威) + 金#C9A961(装饰) + 酒红#8B2635(诉求) + 米白#FAF6F0(背景)

typography.description: Noto Serif SC(主) + SimSun(辅), 衬线字体体现法律权威感, 6级字号层次

layout.card_style: rounded rectangle, border-radius 4px, 法律文档卡片
layout.description: 法律融合布局: 网状关系图(当事人/诉求/证据)+线性时间线(法律事件), 法律图标, 庄重美学

visual_frequency.HF: 法律核心关系 + 法槌图标 + 深蓝强调 (前1/3画面)
visual_frequency.MF: 案件事实 + 法律依据 + 金色支撑 (中段叙事)
visual_frequency.LF: 判决结果 + 法律注释 + 浅色背景 (底部收束)
visual_frequency.progression: 法律关系网络(顶部)→时间线(底部), 证据节点琥珀色, 诉求节点酒红色

cognitive_level.reader_profile: 法律从业者·当事人·需要法律关系梳理
cognitive_level.content_adaptation: 法律知识可视化, 需符合法律行业规范, 术语严谨, 配色庄重

reader_constraint.reader_state: 法律案件分析者·需要严谨可靠信息
reader_constraint.reader_mode: 研读模式(深度分析+法律决策参考)
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 法律庄重配色 + 衬线字体权威感 + 关系时间线复合 + 专业术语

prompt_keywords: legal knowledge map, dignified navy gold palette, law firm aesthetic, legal icons scales gavel documents, network graph relationships, timeline events, formal serif typography, professional legal infographic, authoritative trustworthy
negative_keywords: 3D render, shadows, gradients, photorealistic, dark background, handwritten, sketch, watercolor, cluttered, casual, playful
style_constraint_cn:
【风格强制约束】当前风格: 法律关系时间线图谱
✅ 必须: 法律庄重深蓝金配色 + 衬线字体权威感 + 法律图标(天平/法槌/卷宗) + 关系网络+时间线复合布局
❌ 禁止: 3D渲染 + 阴影 + 渐变 + 轻松配色 + 手绘风格 + 暗色背景
style_constraint_en: IMPORTANT: Legal dignified aesthetic ONLY. Navy #1B2838 + gold #C9A961 + burgundy #8B2635 palette. Legal icons (scales/gavel/documents). Network graph + timeline layout. Noto Serif SC typography. NO 3D, NO casual colors, NO playful elements.
meta_prompt: legal knowledge map, dignified navy #1B2838 primary, gold #C9A961 accents, burgundy #8B2635 claims, cream #FAF6F0 background, legal icons scales gavel documents, network graph of legal relationships, timeline of events, formal Noto Serif SC typography, professional law firm aesthetic, authoritative trustworthy
prompt_example: Legal relationship timeline map, top section network graph of legal relationships (parties/claims/evidence connected), bottom section timeline of legal events, dignified navy #1B2838 background, gold #C9A961 accents, burgundy #8B2635 claim nodes, amber #D4A017 evidence nodes, legal icons (scales/gavel/documents), Noto Serif SC typography (title 20pt bold, body 14pt), cream #FAF6F0 cards, formal dignified composition, professional law firm aesthetic. --ar 3:4 --s 300 --style raw --industry legal --fusion rel-time --tool edrawmax
reference_source: G7 Track G演化结晶 - 万兴市场法律合规分类对齐, 适配律所/法务/合规场景
